title: A2 Bridge checkpoint
subtitle: Combine past, plans, opinions, and service language.
overview: This checkpoint confirms you can move beyond isolated A1 sentences.
Shadow the dialogue, then answer with your own details.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Before I lived..., now I live...

items.es: Ayer fui al centro porque necesitaba comprar comida.
items.en: Yesterday I went downtown because I needed to buy food.

items.es: Antes estudiaba poco, pero ahora estudio todos los días.
items.en: Before I studied little, but now I study every day.

items.es: Mañana voy a llamar al médico para cambiar una cita.
items.en: Tomorrow I am going to call the doctor to change an appointment.

items.es: Creo que escuchar frases ayuda mucho.
items.en: I think listening to sentences helps a lot.

items.es: Si no entiendo algo, lo escucho otra vez.
items.en: If I do not understand something, I listen to it again.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Fui al supermercado, compré comida y después estudié español.
lines.en: I went to the supermarket, bought food, and later studied Spanish.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What are you going to do tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Voy a trabajar y luego voy a practicar una conversación.
lines.en: I am going to work and then I am going to practice a conversation.
